title: Unpatched systems
description: Critical systems running software with known CVEs. Patch cycle exceeds 30 days for non-critical updates.

title: Phishing attack
description: Staff targeted by credential harvesting emails. No MFA enforced on all accounts.

title: Insider threat
description: Privileged users with excessive access rights. No user behaviour analytics in place.

title: DDoS attack
description: No CDN or DDoS mitigation in place for public-facing services.

title: SQL injection data breach
description: Legacy web application has not been tested for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.

title: Lost or stolen laptop
description: Remote workforce using laptops without enforced full-disk encryption policy.
closed_note: Full-disk encryption enforced via MDM policy. Risk accepted at residual level.

title: Third-party supplier breach
description: Key SaaS providers have access to customer data. No supplier security assessments conducted.

title: Cloud storage misconfiguration
description: S3 buckets reviewed. Two buckets had public read enabled — corrected during scan.
closed_note: Block Public Access enabled on all buckets. CloudTrail alerts added for policy changes.
